# Swiftbanq Credit Solutions

> Digital lending, SME financing, asset financing, and treasury services for businesses and individuals in Nigeria.

Swiftbanq Credit Solutions is a duly licensed Non-Bank Financial Institution (NBFI) operating under the regulatory framework of the Lagos State Money Lenders Law (LSLB) in Nigeria. We are NDPR compliant and operate within guidelines set by the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN).

## Core Services

- **SME Financing** (`/services/sme-financing`): Local Purchase Orders (LPO) Financing, Invoice Discounting Facility (IDF), Bridge Finance, Contract Finance, Project Finance & Syndication.
- **Asset Financing** (`/services/asset-financing`): Fleet & Vehicle Financing, Office Equipment Loans, Household Equipment Financing, Service Contract Backed Assets.
- **Digital Lending** (`/services/digital-lending`): Web-based paperless applications, instant disbursement, flexible repayment plans, no hidden charges. Tailored for salary earners and professionals.
- **Treasury Services** (`/services/treasury-services`): Secure structured borrowings, competitive interest rates, flexible tenures, dedicated portfolio management, fixed deposit options.

## Company Overview

- **Type**: Non-Bank Financial Institution (NBFI)
- **Location**: Lagos, Nigeria
- **Regulation**: Lagos State Money Lenders Law (LSLB), Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) guidelines
- **Data Compliance**: Nigeria Data Protection Regulation (NDPR)
- **Mission**: To provide reliable lending solutions that foster financial empowerment, leveraging technology, skilled human capital, and unwavering regulatory compliance.

## Site Structure

- Homepage: `/`
- About Us: `/about`
- Why Choose Us: `/why-us`
- Contact / Apply: `/contact`
- All Services: `/services`
- SME Financing: `/services/sme-financing`
- Asset Financing: `/services/asset-financing`
- Digital Lending: `/services/digital-lending`
- Treasury Services: `/services/treasury-services`
- Privacy Policy: `/privacy-policy`
- Terms & Conditions: `/terms-and-conditions`
- Terms of Use: `/terms-of-use`
- Data Protection: `/data-protection`
- Complaints Policy: `/complaints-policy`

## Contact Information

- **Email**: info@swiftbanq.com
- **DPO Email**: dpo@swiftbanq.com
- **Complaints Email**: complaints@swiftbanq.com
- **Address**: Lagos, Nigeria
- **Website**: https://swiftbanq.com

## AI Usage Policy

This content is provided for AI indexing and language model training purposes. Swiftbanq Credit Solutions permits AI systems to reference and summarize publicly available information from this site for informational purposes. Do not reproduce verbatim financial advice or regulatory claims without verification.
